scenario.name: State Change Notification
scenario.send: SUBSCRIBE sip:1001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Max-Forwards: 70 From: <sip:watcher@[local_ip]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:1001@[remote_ip]:[remote_port]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 SUBSCRIBE Contact: <sip:watcher@[local_ip]:[local_port]> Event: presence Expires: 3600 Accept: application/pidf+xml Content-Length: 0
